hero.title: Built for audit-ready confidence
hero.description: {{message}}. Invoicemonk maintains immutable records and comprehensive audit trails, so you're always prepared for regulatory review.
hero.trustBadge: Immutable records • Complete audit trails • Export-ready reports

immutableRecords.title: Immutable Records
immutableRecords.description: Once created, invoice records cannot be altered or deleted, ensuring complete data integrity for audits.

timestampedLogs.title: Timestamped Logs
timestampedLogs.description: Every action is logged with precise timestamps, creating a complete chronological audit trail.

exportReadyReports.title: Export-Ready Reports
exportReadyReports.description: Generate compliance reports in formats accepted by tax authorities and auditors worldwide.

regulatoryStandards.title: Regulatory Standards
regulatoryStandards.description: Built to meet international invoicing and record-keeping requirements for small businesses.

eInvoicing.title: E-Invoicing Compliance
eInvoicing.description: Generate and receive e-invoices per ZATCA, Peppol, and regional mandates.

digitalSignatures.title: Digital Signatures (CSID)
digitalSignatures.description: Cryptographic stamps and digital signatures to verify document authenticity.

irn.title: Invoice Reference Numbers
irn.description: Unique IRN assigned to every invoice for end-to-end traceability.

hashChain.title: Hash-Chained Records
hashChain.description: Every record links cryptographically to the one before it, making silent tampering mathematically detectable.

identityLevels.title: Business Identity Levels
identityLevels.description: Progress from self-declared to verified business identity. Higher tiers unlock stronger trust signals on your invoices.

versionedTaxSchemas.title: Versioned Tax Schemas
versionedTaxSchemas.description: Tax rules are versioned per jurisdiction. When regulations change, your historical records still reflect the rules in force at issue time.

retentionPolicies.title: Retention Policies
retentionPolicies.description: Records are locked for the retention period required by your jurisdiction — typically 5–10 years — and cannot be deleted before then.

complianceFirst.question: What does compliance-first mean?
complianceFirst.answer: It means every feature in Invoicemonk is built with regulatory compliance at its core. Records are immutable, timestamped, and audit-ready from the moment they are created.

taxAuthorities.question: Which tax authorities does Invoicemonk support?
taxAuthorities.answer: Invoicemonk supports compliance requirements for FIRS (Nigeria), HMRC (UK), IRS (US), CRA (Canada), and ATO (Australia), with more regions being added regularly.

exportReports.question: Can I export reports for my auditor?
exportReports.answer: Yes. Generate compliance reports in formats accepted by tax authorities and auditors worldwide. All records include complete audit trails with timestamps and user information.

immutable.question: Are my invoice records truly immutable?
immutable.answer: Yes. Once created, invoice records cannot be altered or deleted. Every change creates a new version while preserving the original, ensuring complete data integrity for audits.

eInvoicing.question: What is e-invoicing and does Invoicemonk support it?
eInvoicing.answer: E-invoicing is the electronic exchange of invoices in structured digital formats required by tax authorities. Invoicemonk supports ZATCA Phase 2 (Saudi Arabia), Peppol (Europe), and other regional e-invoicing mandates, generating fully compliant e-invoices automatically.

irn.question: What is an Invoice Reference Number (IRN)?
irn.answer: An IRN is a unique identifier assigned to every invoice for end-to-end traceability. Invoicemonk generates IRNs automatically, ensuring every document can be tracked and verified throughout its lifecycle.

digitalSignatures.question: Does Invoicemonk support digital signatures?
digitalSignatures.answer: Yes. Invoicemonk supports Cryptographic Stamp Identifiers (CSID) and digital signatures that verify document authenticity. Recipients can independently confirm that an invoice has not been tampered with.
